record_description: One row = one experimentally measured glass transition temperature (Tg) for a single polymer (or repeat unit) reported in a specific source.

fields.name: record_id
fields.description: Stable unique identifier for one Tg record. Generated as rec_{n} or rec_{polymer_short_name}_{source_id}.

fields.name: polymer_name
fields.description: Polymer name as given in the source (preferred IUPAC or common name, e.g. 'poly(2,6-dimethyl-1,4-phenylene oxide)', 'BTD-HFA polyimide').
fields.normalization_rule: Keep source name in this field; canonical IUPAC name (when available) goes in notes.

fields.name: repeat_unit_smiles
fields.description: SMILES (preferably PSMILES with [*] dummy atoms marking attachment points) of the polymer repeat unit. Used as the primary structural descriptor for ML.
fields.normalization_rule: Canonicalised with RDKit; PSMILES dummy atoms written as [*]; left empty only if structure cannot be resolved (and noted in 'notes').

fields.name: polymer_class
fields.normalization_rule: Controlled vocabulary: polyimide, polyamide, polyester, polycarbonate, polyolefin, polystyrene, poly(meth)acrylate, polyether, polyurethane, polysiloxane, polysulfone, polybenzimidazole, polyphenylene_oxide, polysaccharide, fluoropolymer, other. Lower_snake_case.

fields.name: tg_value
fields.description: Reported glass transition temperature value as a number.

fields.name: tg_unit
fields.description: Unit of the Tg value as reported in the source.
fields.normalization_rule: Controlled vocabulary: 'C' (degrees Celsius) or 'K' (kelvin). Internal conversion to K is performed in cleaning step; raw unit is preserved here.

fields.name: tg_std
fields.description: Reported standard deviation or uncertainty of Tg (same unit as tg_value). Left empty if not reported.

fields.name: measurement_method
fields.description: Experimental method used to measure Tg.
fields.normalization_rule: Controlled vocabulary: DSC (differential scanning calorimetry), DMA (dynamic mechanical analysis), TMA (thermomechanical analysis), dilatometry, dielectric_spectroscopy, simulation_MD, unknown. For computed/simulated values, use 'simulation_MD' and record details in 'notes'.

fields.name: source_id
fields.description: Identifier of the source in specs/source_map.json (e.g. paper_polym16223188, ds_zenodo_lamalab_tg, agg_pubchem).

fields.name: source_type
fields.normalization_rule: Controlled vocabulary: paper, supplementary, dataset, aggregator, database, github_repository.

fields.name: doi
fields.description: DOI of the source (paper or dataset). Empty for sources without a DOI.

fields.name: extraction_method
fields.description: How the record was obtained from the source.
fields.normalization_rule: Controlled vocabulary: manual_pdf, pdf_table_extraction, web_scraping, api_query, dataset_download, manual_aggregator_lookup.

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Free text: ambiguities, alternative names, IUPAC name, measurement context (heating rate, sample preparation), data quality flags, conflicts with other sources, etc.
fields.example: Tg determined from DSC second heating at 10 C/min under N2; Mn = 39 kDa.
